title: How to insert an image from an app
excerpt:
Hi, 
I’m trying to insert an image from my app using monday.execute("addDocBlock", data); but the delta format of images doesn’t work. Also, docs doesn’t include ‘image’ type. Is that possible and how? 
Thanks

posts.author: ashraf (Ashraf)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I’m trying to insert an image from my app using monday.execute("addDocBlock", data); but the delta format of images doesn’t work. Also, docs doesn’t include ‘image’ type. Is that possible and how?

Thanks
